message:
test: add phase1 matrix validation schema, scenario-cell benchmarks, and test improvements

Extend the test suite with new validation logic and benchmark data:

tests/bench_schema.rs:
- Register new schema pi.perf.phase1_matrix_validation.v1 for
  validating phase-1 realistic/matched-state matrix artifacts
- Add PHASE1_MATRIX_SCHEMA constant and comprehensive
  validate_phase1_matrix_validation_record() function that checks:
  - Required top-level fields (run_id, correlation_id,
    matrix_requirements, matrix_cells, stage_summary,
    primary_outcomes, regression_guards, evidence_links,
    consumption_contract, lineage)
  - matrix_requirements: required_partition_tags,
    required_session_message_sizes, required_cell_count
  - Per-cell validation: workload_partition, session_messages,
    scenario_id, pass/fail status, stage_attribution
    (open/append/save/index/total_stage_ms), primary_e2e
    (wall_clock_ms, rust_vs_node/bun ratios), lineage
  - stage_summary: operation_stage_coverage, covered/missing cells
  - primary_outcomes: overall_status, regression detection
  - regression_guards: budget thresholds
  - consumption_contract: format version and fields
- Add 12 new session_workload_matrix benchmark stubs covering
  matched-state and realistic partitions at 100k–5M message sizes

tests/ci_full_suite_gate.rs:
- Add scenario-cell gate validation to CI full suite

tests/e2e_interruption_resume_replay.rs:
- Extend E2E interruption/resume tests with replay verification

tests/hostcall_queue_ebr.rs:
- Add epoch-based reclamation boundary tests for hostcall queue

tests/perf_baseline_variance.rs:
- Add variance tracking improvements for perf baselines

tests/qa_docs_policy_validation.rs:
- Extend QA documentation policy validation coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
